Demo only. This is a parser-friendly employee agreement file for the MVP.
This file is aligned to the local MA000049 award-rulebook demo file in this folder.
Rates shown below are either the current award minimum used in the MVP or a clearly marked over-award contractual rate for override testing.
They are not legal advice and must be replaced with the employer's real contract or enterprise agreement terms.

Employee: Amelia Hart
Employee ID: AIR-001
Award Code: MA000049
Employee Level: Ground services officer Level 1
Job Role: Ground Services Officer
Base Pay Rate: $25.17/hr
